name: EdwDmProvDirProvDmProcFeeLoad

text.value: WITH cte_1 AS (SELECT PROC_CD, PROV_SPEC_CD, PC_FEE_SCHD_ALW_AMT, PCB_FEE_SCHD_ALW_AMT, BA_FEE_SCHD_ALW_AMT, BC_FEE_SCHD_ALW_AMT, SIMPLE_PROC_CD_DESC AS WEB_PROC_CD_DESC, CAST(@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate} AS DATETIME) AS LAST_UPDT_DT FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.AB_TMP_EdwDmProvDirProvDmProcFeeLoad) MERGE @{pipeline().parameters.WebProvDirOwner}.PROV_DIR_DM_PROV_PROC_FEE AS T USING cte_1 AS S ON T.PROC_CD = S.PROC_CD AND T.PROV_SPEC_CD = S.PROV_SPEC_CD WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.PC_FEE_SCHD_ALW_AMT = S.PC_FEE_SCHD_ALW_AMT, T.PCB_FEE_SCHD_ALW_AMT = S.PCB_FEE_SCHD_ALW_AMT, T.BA_FEE_SCHD_ALW_AMT = S.BA_FEE_SCHD_ALW_AMT, T.BC_FEE_SCHD_ALW_AMT = S.BC_FEE_SCHD_ALW_AMT, T.WEB_PROC_CD_DESC = S.WEB_PROC_CD_DESC, T.LAST_UPDT_DT = S.LAST_UPDT_DT WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (PROC_CD, PROV_SPEC_CD, PC_FEE_SCHD_ALW_AMT, PCB_FEE_SCHD_ALW_AMT, BA_FEE_SCHD_ALW_AMT, BC_FEE_SCHD_ALW_AMT, WEB_PROC_CD_DESC, LAST_UPDT_DT) VALUES (S.PROC_CD, S.PROV_SPEC_CD, S.PC_FEE_SCHD_ALW_AMT, S.PCB_FEE_SCHD_ALW_AMT, S.BA_FEE_SCHD_ALW_AMT, S.BC_FEE_SCHD_ALW_AMT, S.WEB_PROC_CD_DESC, S.LAST_UPDT_DT);
